metadata.title: Why Every Qubit Lives on a Globe
metadata.note: Clean Liam rebuild. Surface claim is explicitly restricted to pure states; mixed states lie inside the Bloch ball.

source_of_truth: beat_sheet.json — edit the sheet, not this file

beats.label: This is Liam, in for Bear. A qubit begins as two complex amplitudes, which sounds like four numbers.

beats.prompt: A classical bit offers two isolated choices: zero or one. A pure qubit includes those poles and a continuous family of coherent superpositions between them.
beats.label: A classical bit offers two isolated choices: zero or one. A pure qubit includes those poles and a co

beats.prompt: Start with alpha times zero plus beta times one. Alpha and beta are complex. That is four real numbers.
beats.label: Start with alpha times zero plus beta times one. Alpha and beta are complex. That is four real numbe

beats.prompt: Normalization says the squared magnitudes add to one. That one constraint removes one real degree of freedom, leaving three.
beats.label: Normalization says the squared magnitudes add to one. That one constraint removes one real degree of

beats.prompt: Multiplying the entire state by the same phase changes no measurement probability. Global phase is physically redundant, so one more parameter disappears. Two r
beats.label: Multiplying the entire state by the same phase changes no measurement probability. Global phase is p

beats.prompt: Write those two parameters as angles theta and phi. Theta sets latitude from the north pole. Phi sets longitude around the sphere.
beats.label: Write those two parameters as angles theta and phi. Theta sets latitude from the north pole. Phi set

beats.prompt: The standard form is cosine theta over two times zero, plus e to the i phi times sine theta over two times one. One normalized ray, specified by two angles.
beats.label: The standard form is cosine theta over two times zero, plus e to the i phi times sine theta over two

beats.prompt: At the north pole theta is zero, so the state is zero. At the south pole theta is pi, so it is one, apart from an irrelevant overall phase.
beats.label: At the north pole theta is zero, so the state is zero. At the south pole theta is pi, so it is one,

beats.prompt: On the equator, zero and one have equal magnitude. Longitude phi changes their relative phase, producing physically different interference behavior.
beats.label: On the equator, zero and one have equal magnitude. Longitude phi changes their relative phase, produ

beats.prompt: For theta equals pi over two and phi equals pi over two, the Bloch arrow points along plus y. A z measurement is still fifty-fifty; a y measurement is certain p
beats.label: For theta equals pi over two and phi equals pi over two, the Bloch arrow points along plus y. A z me

beats.prompt: One crucial qualifier: the surface represents pure qubit states. Statistical mixtures live inside the Bloch ball, with the completely mixed state at its center.
beats.label: One crucial qualifier: the surface represents pure qubit states. Statistical mixtures live inside th

beats.prompt: So the globe is not decorative. Normalization and global-phase redundancy compress four real coordinates into the two physical angles of a pure qubit.
beats.label: So the globe is not decorative. Normalization and global-phase redundancy compress four real coordin
Your turn. Put theta at pi over two and phi at zero. Locate the arrow, then predict the probabilitie
Four real numbers enter. Two physical angles remain. That is why a pure qubit lives on a globe.
